---
name: Feature request / suggestion
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem statement / motivation
What problem are you trying to solve? Who benefits and why?

## Proposed solution
Describe the solution you'd like to see, including any API/UX expectations if applicable.

## Alternatives considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional context
Add any other context, links, screenshots, or examples that help explain the request.
